title: What Is Trump’s Ultimate Goal in Iran?
description: Beacon Global Strategies Managing Director and Partner Michael Allen joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on “This Weekend” to discuss the attack on Iran launched by the US and Israel. (Source: Bloomberg)
